purpose: Observe current release state and optionally report facts to a managed goal.

goal.description: Managed goal id to report release-state evidence to.

evidence.description: Evidence key to set on the goal. Default releaseStateObserved.

package.description: Package name to check in npm. Defaults to package.json name.

success: release-state completes and returns a valid canonical result
failure: release-state cannot return a valid canonical result
